meaning: n.易受骗的人,易受愚弄的人vt.欺骗,愚弄n.vt.(=duplicate)
examples: He was accused of being a dupe of the Americans.
Nobody's perfect, even scientists get duped (or try and dupe others).
The "little horror" is the man a woman is forced to marry, a kind of dupe.
To this end, it uses various algorithms to clean and de-dupe the database.
It became easy to dupe him with a fake gold ring or an ivory statuette of a bare-breasted Minoan goddess.
